feed.title: Loop Library
feed.subtitle: Practical AI agent workflows for engineering, research, editorial work, evaluation, and operations.

entry.title: The overnight docs sweep
entry.summary: A scheduled AI coding-agent workflow for comparing documentation with the current codebase, fixing drift, and opening a reviewable pull request.

entry.title: The architecture satisfaction loop
entry.summary: A bounded refactoring workflow that live-tests the system, runs an independent review, commits checkpoints, and records progress.

entry.title: The sub-50 ms page-load loop
entry.summary: A performance optimization workflow for coding agents that uses one repeatable benchmark and stops only when every target page meets the threshold.

entry.title: The production error sweep
entry.summary: A scheduled production-log workflow that traces actionable errors to root causes, verifies fixes, opens a pull request, and reports the result.

entry.title: The 100% test coverage loop
entry.summary: A goal-based coding-agent workflow that identifies uncovered behavior, adds meaningful tests, and stops when the full suite passes at 100% coverage.

entry.title: The SEO/GEO visibility loop
entry.summary: A repeatable search visibility workflow that fixes the highest-impact crawl, indexation, page-intent, citation, and answer-readiness gaps first.

entry.title: The logging coverage loop
entry.summary: A goal-based observability workflow that audits important paths, adds useful structured logs, and verifies success and failure events with tests.

entry.title: The nightly changelog loop
entry.summary: A scheduled coding-agent workflow that reviews the previous day's changes and keeps user-facing release history complete and current.

entry.title: The quality streak loop
entry.summary: A realistic product-testing workflow that turns every failure into documented regression coverage and restarts the success streak after each fix.

entry.title: The full product evaluation loop
entry.summary: A comprehensive product-quality workflow that evaluates realistic scenarios across every major capability, fixes weak outcomes, and reruns them to the defined bar.

entry.title: The test-suite speed loop
entry.summary: A performance workflow for reducing test runtime under repeatable conditions without weakening coverage, assertions, isolation, or behavior.

entry.title: The repository cleanup loop
entry.summary: A repository-hygiene workflow that audits branches, pull requests, commits, and worktrees, recovers valuable changes, and removes proven stale state.

entry.title: The stale-safe batch release loop
entry.summary: A release-coordination workflow that excludes stale or unfinished work, combines valid changes, and ships complete artifacts from the latest integrated main.

entry.title: The production data cleanup loop
entry.summary: A production-data quality workflow that removes disallowed records, improves classification logic, and verifies the remaining dataset against an explicit definition.

entry.title: The post-release baseline loop
entry.summary: A triggered release workflow that runs standard benchmarks against the completed release and records a reproducible baseline for future comparisons.
